    • printSequents

      public static void printSequents(IEventBRoot root) throws RodinDBException
      Prints the names of all the sequents of an Event-B component. Useful for debugging purposes.
      Parameters:
      root - the root of some Event-B component
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - in case of error accessing the Rodin database
